content: I can't figure it out so I have no clue how to handle it but maybe you can! <:murphy_cake:1408324295180030002>

(sorry, haven't been able to work on much in the past few weeks as I recently changed jobs so my work time is less available now, and my leisure time has been mostly taken up by my friends dragging me into a new MMORPG launch)

I just finished up Act 1 Resonances and don't really want to work on further Resonances cus I would need to ask too many questions to compensate for lack of experience, so I'm currently working on cleaning up some of the coordination repo work I've pieced apart before moving on to another task, and it sounds like WoDs need serious help so I might go there next now that I have a robust help network!

and yeah it's funny you mention Pale Descendent specifically because the ground zero post for some poor sob trying to theory craft with that specific bug is in the aforementioned help network server <:lmfao:1408867314497228941> 
https://discord.com/channels/1320097371408830557/1424777561376034958
rip
should I use "my benefactor" or just "benefactor" for Castor
currently it's my
as a title for keeper?
yes
benefactor is probably more accurate as a title
I mean it's the same regardless
but should it be "my" or just benefactor
if he's addressing the keeper directly it'd probably be just Benefactor without the my
if he's referring to the keeper to a third party then my would probably be better
still on texts so
实在困倦的时候，休息一下也就好了，怎么会累呢？
I have no idea what this is supposed to mean
It's fine to take a break when feeling really drowsy; how could one be tired?
the MTL

need circumstances probably for this
Also from Castor’s lines?
without context, i read it as someone saying "if you feel drowsy, just rest a bit and you'll be fine. how can you be tired?"
it's about Winkle
but could be first person too
uh basically Castor's whole text is the Keeper used Castor to do homework
but also yeah, needs context
and Castor keeps bugging the Keeper with a ton o fquestions
honestly prob better to just read the text
because I feel like there's a massive disconnect in the conversation that the MTL isn't getting
not at a PC currently so I can't pull up the source text, can you paste the previous bits of the convo?

恩人，什么时候将新的作业习册交予我呢？
以及关于上次的两本书，我已经通读完毕，一共记下了107处疑问，有劳恩人闲时指点一二。
我错了
我错了
我真的错了
我真的错了
我不该把作业给你写的，自己的事就应该自己做……
求你了，不要再问我了，再这样下去我晚上都会做噩梦的！
啊……抱歉，没想到我的打扰让恩人如此困扰，我真是太迟钝了。
不是，也没有，可能是我不适合做老师吧……
不是，也没有，可能是我不适合做老师吧……
我明白了，那么，恩人有其他精通这两门学科的教师可以推荐吗？
实在无法，我也可以再去读些其他书籍，尝试自学一番。
有……是有。
有……是有，但她的脾气不是很好。
没关系，我不怕。
我怕！
我怕！算了，如果去找温柯尔……呃，她恐怕也会先疯掉的。
疯掉？这位温柯尔老师患有什么疾病吗？
没……也不能说没有……
没……也不能说没有，啊啊啊！总之，我先教你一个学习的真谛！
好的，恩人，我洗耳恭听。
那就是不要什么事都刨根问底！！！
那就是不要什么事都刨根问底！！！
这又是为什么呢？恩人，我不太明白，如果不询问清楚，如何能学习透彻……
你不累吗！
你不累吗！你有这样勤奋的精神进入知识的海洋，你做什么都会成功的……
谢谢恩人，能够自由学习感兴趣的知识，这是多么珍贵又快乐的事。
实在困倦的时候，休息一下也就好了，怎么会累呢？
所以，恩人什么时候能为我介绍一下新的老师呢？我会努力不那么刨根问底的。
嗯……只问97个问题怎么样？
god i love how much of a terrible student the keeper is
eah
this shit is hilarious LOL
it gets even better in the third part where the keeper gets eaten alive by their own guilt
LUL

oh so it possibly means “ if I’m feeling tired, a little rest can help, I won’t be frustrated (in asking for knowledge)”
Castor’s such a good student compare to keeper lol
but yeah keeper is just like "don't you get tired (of learning/questioning)" and castor goes "tired? how can I be tired? if i get sleepy I just rest a bit and I'm fine"
OK that makes sense

tired and fed up are the same word, so keeper is basically like aren't you fed up with doing all this and castor interprets it as aren't you physically tired and goes no I rest properly so I don't get tired
god I love the interactions
castor is such a good boy and keeper is such a miserable failure
oh yeah <@183782216353054720>, can you make two changes for me? (not at a computer atm)
there were a couple of minor issues I found that need to be fixed
Sure what's up?

1. Pale Descendent wheel (out of battle description) currently says "trigger" poison but it's actually "inflict" poison - I actually changed this per someone's previous comment (https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1408434437049417910/1409287597133529298) since I assumed they were correct, as I didn't have the wheel myself at the time so couldn't test it ingame. I have the wheel now and tested it and that's incorrect, the wheel applies poison and doesn't trigger so it's currently wrong and needs to be reverted

2. Can you pull my old StageTitles file and look for the lines in it where I changed a stage title in ch4 to "Her"? It used to be "She", which I changed to "Her" to be more grammatically relevant as I thought it was referring to Francis/Lily's relationship (given the stage description text), but I realized recently that it's actually a reference to one of Lovecraft's short stories, titled "He", so "She" is actually a more accurate referential translation for it, so those should be reverted back to "She"

btw, side note on 1 which I cannot figure out for the life of me but maybe you'll be able to...the out of battle description in english has a % sign in it which is...confusing, because it doesn't reference anything regarding what % it is (and it triggers on defense card so it's not scaling off damage)

I tested it inbattle and it doesn't appear to be scaling off ANY of the three stats, which is what almost all scalings in this game work off of. It also doesn't appear to be scaling off existing poison because it applies poison stacks even without any poison already existing on the enemy

what muddies the waters even more is that the inbattle description of it *is* accurate and does list it correctly...but the number inbattle is COMPLETELY different from out of battle even though both appear to reference the same variable...so what is going on with this?? (called to my attention via https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1428848541949755432/1428848541949755432)
